<a id="about"></a>

## Acerca del proyecto

This repository collects reproducible e-commerce image prompts with structured metadata, clear attribution, licensing records, and multiple preview outputs.

Each record keeps a campaign-set prompt for visual exploration and provides standalone, copy-ready prompts for individual assets. The schema also supports product-edit workflows with required product invariants and licensed Before/After evidence.

<a id="ec-0011"></a>

### 1. Cordless Car Vacuum Triptych

> This title and description use the English fallback.

Combines catalog accuracy, practical in-car use, and a restrained technology hero for one handheld vacuum.

<p align="center">
<img src="assets/prompts/automotive-vacuum/preview-1.png" width="31%" alt="Cordless car vacuum and brush attachment on white">
<img src="assets/prompts/automotive-vacuum/preview-2.png" width="31%" alt="Handheld vacuum cleaning a charcoal car seat">
<img src="assets/prompts/automotive-vacuum/preview-3.png" width="31%" alt="Gunmetal car vacuum technology hero with orange airflow">
</p>

| Mode | Category | Use cases | Plataformas |
|---|---|---|---|
| `text-to-image` | Automotive accessories | Marketplace main image, Branded hero, Feature visual | Amazon, eBay, Tmall |

- **Styles:** Technical, Minimalist clean, Cinematic
- **Backgrounds:** Pure white, Lifestyle location, Dark studio
- **Asset purpose:** Campaign set
- **Input requirements:** No reference image is required. This record defines a fictional, unbranded product; use product-edit mode for real inventory.

#### Ready-to-use single-image prompts

<details>
<summary><strong>1. AMAZON CATALOG · Marketplace main image · Amazon · 4:5</strong></summary>

- **Asset purpose:** Marketplace main image
- **Backgrounds:** Pure white

```text
Create one standalone 4:5 e-commerce image, not a collage, contact sheet, split screen, or multi-panel layout.
Product specification and invariants: identical slim cylindrical vacuum in this output; matte gunmetal aluminum body, tapered black nozzle, one narrow transparent dust chamber near the front, single burnt-orange oval power button, fine perforated rear exhaust ring, no logo. Preserve proportions, chamber position, button and nozzle geometry.
Art direction: vacuum alone lying at a slight diagonal on pure #FFFFFF, fully visible with short brush attachment placed neatly beside it, soft grounding shadows, crisp honest product detail, no packaging and no extra accessories.
Photography and rendering: ultra-photorealistic consumer-tech advertising, physically plausible metal, transparent plastic, fabric and hand anatomy, restrained gunmetal/orange palette, premium but functional.
Quality and safety constraints: no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no extra vacuum, no duplicated hand, no visible car brand, no impossible exploded parts, no excessive dirt, no added layout labels or numbers. Keep the exact vacuum design consistent in this output.
```

_Generated specifically for this repository from the corresponding prompt direction; no third-party preview image is redistributed. License: CC-BY-4.0._

</details>

<details><summary><strong>Original campaign-set prompt</strong></summary>

```text
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: three automotive-accessory e-commerce previews in one seamless horizontal contact sheet
Primary request: Create a precision 3-panel horizontal contact sheet for the exact same unbranded cordless handheld car vacuum, with distinct Amazon catalog, eBay practical-use, and Tmall technology-hero treatments. Each panel is a complete standalone vertical 4:5 image, separated by narrow graphite gutters.
Product invariant: identical slim cylindrical vacuum in every panel; matte gunmetal aluminum body, tapered black nozzle, one narrow transparent dust chamber near the front, single burnt-orange oval power button, fine perforated rear exhaust ring, no logo. Preserve proportions, chamber position, button and nozzle geometry.
Panel 1 — AMAZON CATALOG: vacuum alone lying at a slight diagonal on pure #FFFFFF, fully visible with short brush attachment placed neatly beside it, soft grounding shadows, crisp honest product detail, no packaging and no extra accessories.
Panel 2 — EBAY PRACTICAL USE: same vacuum held naturally by one adult hand cleaning crumbs from the seam of a charcoal fabric car seat, close documentary crop, believable suction path and debris amount, bright diffused garage daylight, product remains sharp and unobstructed.
Panel 3 — TMALL TECHNOLOGY HERO: same vacuum floating horizontally above a dark graphite platform, controlled orange airflow ribbons curve into the nozzle and fade at the dust chamber, precise cool rim light, microscopic metal texture, dramatic black negative space, premium engineering mood without text.
Style/medium: ultra-photorealistic consumer-tech advertising, physically plausible metal, transparent plastic, fabric and hand anatomy, restrained gunmetal/orange palette, premium but functional.
Constraints: no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no extra vacuum, no duplicated hand, no visible car brand, no impossible exploded parts, no excessive dirt, no panel labels or numbers. Keep the exact vacuum design consistent across all panels.
```

</details>

<details><summary><strong>Product invariants</strong></summary>

- identical slim cylindrical vacuum in this output; matte gunmetal aluminum body, tapered black nozzle, one narrow transparent dust chamber near the front, single burnt-orange oval power button, fine perforated rear exhaust ring, no logo. Preserve proportions, chamber position, button and nozzle geometry.
- **Negative constraints:** no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no extra vacuum, no duplicated hand, no visible car brand, no impossible exploded parts, no excessive dirt, no added layout labels or numbers. Keep the exact vacuum design consistent in this output.

<details>
<summary><strong>1. FARFETCH CATALOG · Catalog image · Farfetch · 4:5</strong></summary>

```text

Quality and safety constraints: no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no extra bag, no duplicated strap, no gold hardware, no hands covering the product, no distorted body, no added layout labels or numbers. Keep the exact bag design consistent in this output.
```

```text
Primary request: Create a fresh, culturally respectful 3-panel horizontal contact sheet for the exact same unbranded ceremonial matcha tin, with distinct Amazon Grocery catalog, Shopify tea-ritual, and Xiaohongshu iced-latte treatments. Each panel is a complete standalone vertical 4:5 image, separated by narrow deep-green gutters.
Product invariant: identical small cylindrical tin in every panel; matte pale celadon body, flush deep-green lid, one narrow vertical cream paper seal crossing the lid edge with no writing, subtle brushed metal rim, no logo and no text. Preserve proportions, lid color, blank seal, rim and finish.
Panel 1 — AMAZON GROCERY CATALOG: one sealed tin centered on pure #FFFFFF with the lid closed, a small bamboo teaspoon beside it holding a neat mound of vivid fine matcha powder, soft natural grounding shadows, accurate scale, clean product clarity.
Panel 2 — SHOPIFY TEA RITUAL: same tin open on a dark charcoal stone tea table, lid placed behind it, bright green powder visible inside, one unbranded black-glazed tea bowl and bamboo whisk nearby, soft directional morning light through paper screen, quiet contemporary Japanese-inspired restraint without ceremonial costume or decorative cliché.
Panel 3 — XIAOHONGSHU ICED MATCHA: same closed tin on a translucent mint acrylic block beside one tall clear glass of layered iced matcha oat latte, condensation and realistic ice, hard summer sunlight creates graphic green caustics across a cream surface, energetic creator-style framing with negative space and no text.
Style/medium: ultra-photorealistic premium food-and-packaging photography, physically accurate powder fineness, matte metal, glass, ice and condensation, crisp celadon/green/cream palette, sophisticated commercial styling.
Constraints: no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no extra tin, no health claims, no people or hands, no floating powder, no impossible liquid layers, no panel labels or numbers. Keep the exact tin design consistent across all panels.
```

</details>

<details><summary><strong>Product invariants</strong></summary>

- identical small cylindrical tin in this output; matte pale celadon body, flush deep-green lid, one narrow vertical cream paper seal crossing the lid edge with no writing, subtle brushed metal rim, no logo and no text. Preserve proportions, lid color, blank seal, rim and finish.
- **Negative constraints:** no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no extra tin, no health claims, no people or hands, no floating powder, no impossible liquid layers, no added layout labels or numbers. Keep the exact tin design consistent in this output.

- **Asset purpose:** Catalog image
- **Backgrounds:** Soft studio

```text

Product specification and invariants: identical watch in this output; 38 mm brushed bronze cushion case, deep moss-green sunray dial, twelve slim applied gold baton hour markers with no numerals, two gold dauphine hands fixed at 10:10, small seconds subdial at 6 o'clock, domed crystal, dark brown suede strap with tonal stitching, no logo and no date window. Photography and rendering: ultra-photorealistic high-watchmaking photography, physically accurate bronze patina, optical crystal, sunray dial and suede nap, disciplined retouching, rich but natural black point.
Quality and safety constraints: no readable text, no logo, no watermark, no extra watch, no jewelry, no distorted wrist or fingers, no duplicate crown, no incorrect numerals, no added layout labels or numbers. Keep the exact watch design and 10:10 hand position consistent.
```
